title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SPOTTING ERROR1 100 BY @AMITJHA

questions.question: You have said that, / as he took money from you many times, / he owes you / five thousand rupees all together. (SSC Stenographer 10/12/2024 Morning)
options: as he took money from you many times
questions.explanation: Replace 'all together' with 'altogether'. 'All together' means 'everyone together', 'altogether' means 'completely'. 'All together' का अर्थ 'एक साथ' है, जबकि 'altogether' का अर्थ 'पूरी तरह से' है।

questions.question: Parts of the following sentence have been underlined and given as options. Select the option that contains an error. I stayed in my hometown with my parents on the pandemic. (SSC Stenographer 10/12/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Replace 'on' with 'during'. 'During' indicates a period of time. 'On' का प्रयोग विशिष्ट दिन के लिए होता है, जबकि 'during' का प्रयोग समयावधि के लिए होता है।

questions.question: In August, she will be enjoying / all the fruits her grandmother / will plant last January. (SSC Stenographer 10/12/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will plant' with 'planted'. 'Last January' indicates past tense. 'Last January' भूतकाल को दर्शाता है, इसलिए 'planted' का प्रयोग होगा।

questions.question: The compensation that the [A] / Government agreed to provide to [B] / the dependents of the [C] / train accident is fairly less [D]. (SSC Stenographer 10/12/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Replace 'less' with 'low'. There is no comparison here. यहाँ कोई तुलना नहीं है, इसलिए 'low' का प्रयोग करें। 'Less' comparative degree है।

questions.question: (a) The more it rains,/ (b) worse/ (c) the roads become/ (d) No error (SSC Stenographer 10/12/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: Replace 'worse' with 'the worse'. Use 'the' before comparative degrees in successive comparison. क्रमिक तुलना में comparative degree से पहले 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mr. Unkerton glanced to the inspector, / who merely snorted / and looked at the ceiling. (SSC Stenographer 10/12/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: Replace 'to' with 'at'. We glance 'at' someone. हम किसी पर 'glance at' करते हैं, 'to' नहीं।

questions.question: She spotted the novel [A] / and shouted, "Here the book lies [B] / that we were searching for[C] / all around."[D] (SSC Stenographer 11/12/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Replace "Here the book lies" with "Here lies the book". Inversion is used after 'Here'. 'Here' के बाद Inversion का प्रयोग होता है, इसलिए 'Here lies the book' सही है।

questions.question: Raghu did not get the job / because he did not have / experience enough for the post. (SSC Stenographer 11/12/2024 Afternoon)
options: Raghu did not get the job
questions.explanation: Replace 'experience enough' with 'enough experience'. 'Enough' as an adjective comes before the noun. 'Enough' विशेषण के रूप में संज्ञा से पहले आता है।

questions.question: I will have been studying English for three years by the end of this course. (SSC Stenographer 11/12/2024 Evening)
options: I had been studying English for three years by the end of this course.
I have been studying English for three years by the end of this course.
I will have been studying English for three years by the end of this course.
I was studying English for three years by the end of this course.
questions.explanation: No error. The sentence correctly uses Future Perfect Continuous Tense. वाक्य सही है।

questions.question: The police are searching about the missing jewellery. (SSC Stenographer 11/12/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: Replace 'about' with 'for'. 'Search for' is the correct phrasal verb. 'Search for' सही वाक्यांश है।

questions.question: John is really / good in/ playing/ the piano. (SSC Stenographer 11/12/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: Replace 'good in' with 'good at'. We use 'good at' for skills. कौशल के लिए हम 'good at' का उपयोग करते हैं।

questions.question: The Supreme Court set away / the verdict of the High Court / and agreed to hear the plea / of the complainant. (SSC CHSL Tier II 18/11/2024)
options: and agreed to hear the plea
the verdict of the High Court
questions.explanation: Replace 'set away' with 'set aside'. 'Set aside' means to annul a legal decision. 'Set aside' का अर्थ है कानूनी फैसले को रद्द करना।

questions.question: Mrs. Premlatha asked / Malini to hand down / all the payment slips. (SSC MTS 30/09/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Replace 'hand down' with 'hand out'. 'Hand out' means to distribute. 'Hand out' का अर्थ है वितरित करना।

questions.question: She is / as more intelligent as / her brothers are. (SSC MTS 01/10/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Replace 'more' with 'much'. Use positive degree with 'as...as'. 'As...as' के साथ positive degree का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He is waiting / at airport to receive / / Mr. Smith, who is / coming from South Africa. (SSC MTS 07/10/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Replace 'at airport' with 'at the airport'. Use 'the' before specific places. विशिष्ट स्थानों से पहले 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I hope that / yesterday's lunch / at Rahul's place / was at your liking. (SSC MTS 08/10/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Replace 'at your liking' with 'to your liking'. It is a fixed phrase. यह एक निश्चित वाक्यांश है।

questions.question: She forbade / him not / to enter that / room. (SSC MTS 09/10/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Remove 'not'. 'Forbade' is negative, so 'not' is superfluous. 'Forbade' नकारात्मक है, इसलिए 'not' अनावश्यक है।

questions.question: He climbed of / the steep mountain trail, / his backpack heavy / with supplies for the journey. (SSC MTS 14/10/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Replace 'climbed of' with 'climbed up'. 'Climb up' implies ascent. 'Climb up' का अर्थ ऊपर चढ़ना है।

questions.question: Sam and Teena / had wondering / what to do this weekend. (SSC MTS 15/10/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Replace 'had wondering' with 'were wondering'. Past Continuous tense is needed. Past Continuous tense की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: You know that I am fond of reading / and also that all books are my favourite / but you don't know that this is one of / my favourite book. (SSC MTS 16/10/2024 Morning)
options: but you don't know that this is one of
and also that all books are my favourite
You know that I am fond of reading
questions.explanation: Replace 'book' with 'books'. 'One of' takes a plural noun. 'One of' के बाद बहुवचन संज्ञा आती है।

questions.question: Select the sentence that has a grammatical error. (SSC MTS 16/10/2024 Evening)
options: This is a very difficult task to accomplish.
A young boy offered her his seat.
I have a lot of work to complete.
I wish I had eraser to erase all the mistakes in my life.
questions.explanation: Use 'an' before 'eraser'. It is a singular countable noun starting with a vowel sound. 'Eraser' से पहले 'an' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: In addition with / the existing crisis in economy, / the rise of hunger index / is another cause of worry. (SSC MTS 17/10/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Replace 'with' with 'to'. The phrase is 'in addition to'. सही वाक्यांश 'in addition to' है।

questions.question: Select the sentence that has a grammatical error. (SSC MTS 18/10/2024 Evening)
options: She usually walks her dog in the park every morning.
They play chess together on weekends.
The train leaves the station at 8:00 a.m. every day.
questions.explanation: Replace 'don't' with 'doesn't'. 'He' is singular. 'He' एकवचन है, इसलिए 'doesn't' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct sentence. (SSC MTS 21/10/2024 Afternoon)
options: The intricate dance of neurotransmitters in a synaptic cleft plays the crucial role in neural communication.
The intricate dance of neurotransmitters in the synaptic cleft plays a crucial role in neural communication.
An intricate dance of neurotransmitters in a synaptic cleft plays a crucial role in neural communication.
An intricate dance of neurotransmitters in the synaptic cleft plays the crucial role in neural communication.
questions.explanation: 'The' before specific 'dance' and 'cleft', 'a' before general 'role'. विशिष्ट संज्ञाओं के लिए 'the' और सामान्य के लिए 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He will have to / knuckle up really seriously, / if he wants to / crack the upcoming deal. (SSC MTS 21/10/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: Replace 'knuckle up' with 'knuckle down'. 'Knuckle down' means to apply oneself seriously. 'Knuckle down' का अर्थ है गंभीरता से प्रयास करना।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct sentence. (SSC MTS 23/10/2024 Afternoon)
options: A lot of books and notes placed on order looks most fascinating.
A lot of books and notes placed in order look fascinating.
A lot of books and notes place in order look most fascinating.
A lot of book and notes placed in order looks most fascinating.
questions.explanation: Plural subject 'books and notes' requires plural verb 'look'. 'Fascinating' doesn't need superlative here. बहुवचन कर्ता के साथ बहुवचन क्रिया का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He missed the college bus / because he woke up / unpardonably lately in the morning. (SSC MTS 28/10/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Replace 'lately' with 'late'. 'Lately' means recently, 'late' means after the expected time. 'Lately' का अर्थ है हाल ही में, 'late' का अर्थ है देर से।

questions.question: After the match, / the stadium was the messiest / it's ever been. (SSC MTS 30/10/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य व्याकरण की दृष्टि से सही है।

questions.question: Gita got onto / the book / she was reading / this morning. (SSC MTS 30/10/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Replace 'got onto' with 'got into'. 'Got into' means became interested in. 'Got into' का अर्थ है रुचि लेना।

questions.question: Although experts are worried / that retail inflation is rising / at a steep rate, / the crisis will soon blow away. (SSC MTS 04/11/2024 Morning)
options: the crisis will soon blow away
questions.explanation: Replace 'blow away' with 'blow over'. 'Blow over' means to pass or subside. 'Blow over' का अर्थ है गुजर जाना या समाप्त हो जाना।

questions.question: Select the option that has an error in the use of present tense. (SSC MTS 05/11/2024 Afternoon)
options: I have performed all my duties with utmost sincerity.
I am observing your mischievous activities for half an hour.
The mother cooks delicious food for her children.
The painter is painting the wall right now.
questions.explanation: Replace 'am observing' with 'have been observing'. Use Perfect Continuous for duration. समय अवधि के लिए Perfect Continuous का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: My mother is 51 years old, / and my uncle is 48 years old. / So my mother is old than my uncle. (SSC MTS 11/11/2024 2nd Shift)
options: So my mother is old than my uncle
and my uncle is 48 years old.
questions.explanation: Replace 'old' with 'older'. Use comparative degree with 'than'. 'Than' के साथ comparative degree का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: My sister is allergic with peanuts, so be cautious when preparing her meal (SSC MTS 11/11/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'with' with 'to'. 'Allergic to' is the correct preposition. 'Allergic' के साथ 'to' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Select the sentence that has a grammatical error. (SSC MTS 11/11/2024 Evening)
options: The cat is sleeping on a mat.
She is an artist at a local gallery.
They have an information about the event.
Can you bring me the keys to the car?
questions.explanation: Remove 'an'. 'Information' is uncountable. 'Information' अगणनीय संज्ञा है, 'an' का प्रयोग न करें।

questions.question: Whenever she is coming / here, she brings / many gifts for everyone. (SSC MTS 12/11/2024 Morning)
questions.explanation: Replace 'is coming' with 'comes'. Use Simple Present for habitual actions. आदतन कार्यों के लिए Simple Present का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct sentence. (SSC MTS 12/11/2024 Evening)
options: She was not allowed to enter the hotel as her clothes were dirtier.
She was not allowed to enter the hotel as her clothes were dirty.
She was not allowed to enter the hotel as her clothes was dirtier.
She was not allow to enter the hotel as her clothes were dirty.
questions.explanation: Correct passive structure (was allowed) and subject-verb agreement (clothes were). सही पैसिव संरचना और कर्ता-क्रिया समझौता।

questions.question: My aunt came from Switzerland by the flight which was landing at 5:00 a.m. yesterday. (SSC MTS 13/11/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: Remove 'the' before 'flight' in 'by flight'. Modes of transport with 'by' don't take articles. 'By' के साथ परिवहन के साधनों में article नहीं लगता।

questions.question: (1) We knocked across (2) early on Saturday (3) to enjoy (4) the beautiful weather. (SSC MTS 13/11/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: Replace 'knocked across' with 'knocked off'. 'Knock off' means to stop working. 'Knock off' का अर्थ है काम बंद करना।

questions.question: He bought strange vintage car on auction from the customs department. (SSC MTS 14/11/2024 Afternoon)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'strange'. Singular countable nouns need an article. एकवचन गणनीय संज्ञाओं के लिए article की आवश्यकता होती है।

questions.question: I thought of this idea / just when you called / me yesterday. (SSC MTS 14/11/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य व्याकरण की दृष्टि से सही है।

questions.question: Meenu looks / much better / today. (SSC MTS 14/11/2024 Evening)
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य व्याकरण की दृष्टि से सही है।

questions.question: Mr. Abhilash and his family / have received / no informations / about the incident. (SSC CGL 09/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'informations' with 'information'. It is uncountable. 'Information' अगणनीय संज्ञा है, इसका बहुवचन नहीं होता।

questions.question: Every students in the hostel decided to travel to Delhi to witness the Republic Day parade. (SSC CGL 09/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'students' with 'student'. 'Every' takes a singular noun. 'Every' के साथ एकवचन संज्ञा का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: By this time next year / I will had graduated from college / and starting my first job / in the field of marketing. (SSC CGL 09/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: I will had graduated from college
questions.explanation: Replace 'will had' with 'will have'. Future Perfect Tense uses 'will have'. Future Perfect Tense में 'will have' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: I are dancing with my husband at my sister's wedding. (SSC CGL 09/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'are' with 'am'. 'I' takes 'am'. 'I' के साथ 'am' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: After the concert was over, / they go to a restaurant, / had dinner together / and talked until midnight. (SSC CGL 10/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'go' with 'went'. The sentence is in the past tense. वाक्य भूतकाल में है, इसलिए 'went' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Renewable energy / sources like solar and wind power / will replaced traditional fossil fuels / and help reduce carbon emissions. (SSC CGL 10/09/2024 1st Shift)
options: sources like solar and wind power
questions.explanation: Replace 'will replaced' with 'will replace'. Modals take V1. Modals के साथ क्रिया की पहली अवस्था (V1) का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: No other place in this country is so better as Gulmarg, Kashmir. (SSC CGL 10/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'better' with 'good'. Use positive degree with 'so...as'. 'So...as' के साथ positive degree का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Our family is planning / a trip to Europe next summer / where we should visit several famous / landmarks and enjoy local cuisine. (SSC CGL 10/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: where we should visit several famous
a trip to Europe next summer
questions.explanation: Replace 'should' with 'will'. It refers to a future plan. यह भविष्य की योजना को संदर्भित करता है, इसलिए 'will' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: It is he who work for the company for more than a decade. (SSC CGL 11/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'who work' with 'who has been working'. 'For more than a decade' implies continuous duration. समयावधि के लिए Perfect Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The windows / violent banged / during the / storm yesterday. (SSC CGL 11/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'violent' with 'violently'. Adverb modifies the verb 'banged'. क्रिया 'banged' की विशेषता बताने के लिए क्रियाविशेषण 'violently' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Neither my brother nor my brothers-in-law / attended the meeting / as his health is not more good. (SSC CGL 11/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: as his health is not more good
Neither my brother nor my brothers-in-law
questions.explanation: Replace with 'as his health was not good'. Past context and incorrect comparison. भूतकाल का संदर्भ है और तुलना गलत है।

questions.question: Rahul thinks he is as smarter as his friends in the class. (SSC CGL 11/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'smarter' with 'smart'. Use positive degree with 'as...as'. 'As...as' के साथ positive degree का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Solutions to the country's interior problems are still a long way away. (SSC CGL 11/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'interior' with 'internal'. 'Internal problems' refers to domestic issues. देश की आंतरिक समस्याओं के लिए 'internal' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: They secret / decided / to leave / the town. (SSC CGL 11/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'secret' with 'secretly'. Adverb modifies the verb 'decided'. क्रिया 'decided' की विशेषता बताने के लिए क्रियाविशेषण 'secretly' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He ran quick to catch the bus. (SSC CGL 12/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'quick' with 'quickly'. Adverb is needed to modify 'ran'. क्रिया 'ran' की विशेषता बताने के लिए क्रियाविशेषण 'quickly' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mrs. Sreelakshmi's / musical intelligence / is superior than / Mrs. Suma's. (SSC CGL 12/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'than' with 'to'. 'Superior' takes 'to'. 'Superior' के साथ 'to' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: The employees were comfortable / with me and they talked about / their problems since / I has worked there as a manager. (SSC CGL 12/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: with me and they talked about
I has worked there as a manager.
questions.explanation: Replace 'I has' with 'I had'. Past context requires Past Perfect. भूतकाल के संदर्भ के लिए Past Perfect का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mr. Arun / will pay dear / for his / financial mistake. (SSC CGL 12/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'dear' with 'dearly'. Adverb modifies 'pay'. क्रिया 'pay' की विशेषता बताने के लिए क्रियाविशेषण 'dearly' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: My brother received / his MBA degree into / the university last year. (SSC CGL 12/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'into' with 'from'. Receive from a source. स्रोत से प्राप्त करने के लिए 'from' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He replied / in a dry tone, / "Ouch! I will not work / for you anymore." (SSC CGL 12/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'Ouch' with 'Ugh' or similar. 'Ouch' is for pain, not annoyance. 'Ouch' दर्द के लिए होता है, झुंझलाहट के लिए 'Ugh' उपयुक्त है।

questions.question: Mr. Surya / have no interior / motive in offering / you support. (SSC CGL 13/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'have no interior' with 'has no ulterior'. 'Ulterior motive' is the phrase. 'Ulterior motive' सही वाक्यांश है और Surya एकवचन है।

questions.question: By the end of / this month, he / will been working / for five years. (SSC CGL 13/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will been' with 'will have been'. Future Perfect Continuous Tense. Future Perfect Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I have the hundred reasons to not attend the meeting tomorrow. (SSC CGL 13/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'the' with 'a'. 'A hundred reasons' is correct for an indefinite number. अनिश्चित संख्या के लिए 'a hundred' सही है।

questions.question: After I retire, I started a second career / as a writer and published several books / which allowed me to share my stories / and insights with a wider audience. (SSC CGL 13/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: After I retire, I started a second career
which allowed me to share my stories
as a writer and published several books
and insights with a wider audience
questions.explanation: Replace 'retire' with 'had retired'. Past perfect for the first action. पहली क्रिया के लिए Past Perfect का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Although the team had trained diligently for months, they had still overwhelmed by the opponent's unexpected tactics. (SSC CGL 13/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'had' with 'were'. Passive voice is needed. Passive voice की आवश्यकता है, इसलिए 'were overwhelmed' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Due to the pandemic, / the prices of /medicines increased / every day since / last December. (SSC CGL 17/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'increased' with 'have been increasing'. 'Since' implies continuous action. 'Since' निरंतर क्रिया को दर्शाता है।

questions.question: UNESCO works to / strengthen an intellectual / and moral solidarity / of humankind. (SSC CGL 17/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'the'. Specific solidarity. विशिष्ट एकजुटता के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Dr. Sinha has / brought about a new / book on social impact of child labour. (SSC CGL 17/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'brought about' with 'brought out'. 'Bring out' means to publish. 'Bring out' का अर्थ है प्रकाशित करना।

questions.question: Select the sentence that has a grammatical error. (SSC CGL 17/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: Karl Marx was a renowned social scientist.
Indian force are known for their loyalty and integrity.
It is impossible to wake Christine up in the morning.
It is said that Joseph was not ready to go to war.
questions.explanation: Replace 'force' with 'forces'. 'Indian forces' refers to the military. 'Indian forces' सेना को संदर्भित करता है।

questions.question: Brr, the city view from the Eiffel Tower is amazing! (SSC CGL 17/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'Brr' with 'Wow'. 'Brr' indicates cold, 'Wow' indicates amazement. 'Brr' ठंड को दर्शाता है, 'Wow' आश्चर्य को।

questions.question: Having known that / the train was already on the platform, / they ran fastly / to catch it. (SSC CGL 17/09/2024 3rd Shift)
options: the train was already on the platform
questions.explanation: Replace 'fastly' with 'fast'. 'Fast' is both adjective and adverb. 'Fast' विशेषण और क्रियाविशेषण दोनों है, 'fastly' गलत है।

questions.question: Deepa and Seema are both good with running, but Deepa is also good at catching the ball and throwing it to the right corner in time. (SSC CGL 18/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'good with' with 'good at'. 'Good at' denotes skill. कौशल के लिए 'good at' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: People admired him, for / he lived by the same principals / that he preached. (SSC CGL 18/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: he lived by the same principals
questions.explanation: Replace 'principals' with 'principles'. 'Principles' means beliefs. 'Principles' का अर्थ है सिद्धांत।

questions.question: We were on the way/ to the party;/ suddenly, there/ will a heavy downpour. (SSC CGL 18/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will' with 'was'. The sentence is in the past tense. वाक्य भूतकाल में है, इसलिए 'was' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He never talks / for anybody. / He is alone / all day. (SSC CGL 18/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'for' with 'to'. Talk 'to' somebody. किसी से बात करने के लिए 'talk to' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The police told the agitators to back in, else they would lathi-charge. (SSC CGL 19/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'back in' with 'back out' or 'back off'. 'Back off' means to retreat. 'Back off' का अर्थ है पीछे हटना।

questions.question: We took dinner in a Chinese restaurant and were amazed to see the interior of a restaurant. (SSC CGL 19/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a restaurant' with 'the restaurant'. Specific reference. विशिष्ट संदर्भ के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mr. Ali's shop / is further to / the hospital. (SSC CGL 19/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'further to' with 'farther than'. 'Farther' for physical distance. शारीरिक दूरी के लिए 'farther' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Rahul sings very good. (SSC CGL 19/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'good' with 'well'. Adverb needed for 'sings'. क्रिया 'sings' के लिए क्रियाविशेषण 'well' की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: In some countries, you are not able to drink until you are 21. (SSC CGL 19/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'able' with 'allowed'. Permission context. अनुमति के संदर्भ में 'allowed' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Two of the world's / best forwards / has played alongside / David Beckham. (SSC CGL 23/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'has' with 'have'. Plural subject 'Two'. बहुवचन कर्ता 'Two' के लिए 'have' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Ourselves should not boast of one's knowledge. (SSC CGL 23/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'Ourselves' with 'We'. Subjective case required. कर्ता कारक 'We' की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: He always wants to be in the company of those who are intellectually superior than him. (SSC CGL 23/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'than' with 'to'. 'Superior' takes 'to'. 'Superior' के साथ 'to' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: I have sing 'Let It Go' before a crowd of thousands of people. (SSC CGL 23/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'sing' with 'sung'. Have + V3. 'Have' के साथ क्रिया की तीसरी अवस्था (V3) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mr. Suman / asked me / to pack/ my luggages. (SSC CGL 23/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'luggages' with 'luggage'. Uncountable noun. 'Luggage' अगणनीय संज्ञा है, इसका बहुवचन नहीं होता।

questions.question: Camels tend to move slowly than other domestic animals in the plains. (SSC CGL 24/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'slowly' with 'slower'. Comparative degree required. तुलनात्मक अवस्था की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: Deepak is studying B.tech. at IIT Delhi to become the engineer. (SSC CGL 24/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'the' with 'an'. General sense. सामान्य अर्थ में 'an' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Master Sam / is a heaviest / boy in / grade twelve. (SSC CGL 24/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'the'. Superlative degree takes 'the'. Superlative degree के साथ 'the' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Jerry driving/home late / when the incident / took place. (SSC CGL 24/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'Jerry driving' with 'Jerry was driving'. Helper verb is missing. सहायक क्रिया 'was' गायब है।

questions.question: The lions became violently / when the visitors / started throwing/stones at them. (SSC CGL 24/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'violently' with 'violent'. Adjective needed after linking verb. Linking verb के बाद विशेषण 'violent' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: My dog/barks / very louder / at night. (SSC CGL 25/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'louder' with 'loudly'. Adverb needed. क्रियाविशेषण 'loudly' की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: The company specialises at / designing, crafting and manufacturing / exquisite, high-quality furniture / of exceptional craftsmanship. (SSC CGL 25/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'at' with 'in'. 'Specialise in' is correct. 'Specialise in' सही है।

questions.question: He and his friends / does not / want to attend the meeting. (SSC CGL 25/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'does' with 'do'. Plural subject. बहुवचन कर्ता के लिए 'do' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: In the recent past, the IT industry has emerged / as a major contributor to an industry revenue / as well as employment / opportunity provider in the country. (SSC CGL 25/09/2024 2nd Shift)
options: In the recent past, the IT industry has emerged
as a major contributor to an industry revenue
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'the'. Specific industry revenue. विशिष्ट उद्योग राजस्व के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: While I was walking to the store, my friend calls me and ask for a favour. (SSC CGL 25/09/2024 3rd Shift)
options: my friend calls me and ask
questions.explanation: Replace 'calls... ask' with 'called... asked'. Past tense consistency. भूतकाल की निरंतरता बनाए रखें।

questions.question: Please go and meet the chairperson. / She will be / away for the / few next days. (SSC CGL 25/09/2024 3rd Shift)
options: Please go and meet the chairperson.
questions.explanation: Replace 'few next days' with 'next few days'. Correct order. सही क्रम 'next few days' है।

questions.question: The teacher asked him not to keep disturbing the class, but it had no affect. (SSC CGL 26/09/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'affect' with 'effect'. 'Effect' is the noun. संज्ञा 'effect' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: This is the book whom I wanted to buy. (SSC CGL 26/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'whom' with 'which' or 'that'. 'Book' is inanimate. 'Book' निर्जीव है, इसलिए 'which' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: My colleague always works latest than me. (SSC CGL 26/09/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'latest' with 'later'. Comparative degree. तुलनात्मक अवस्था 'later' का प्रयोग करें।
